You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: London
TO: Lyon
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: In May

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: London
TO: Lyon
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: In May

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: London
TO: Lyon
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: In May

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: London
TO: Lyon
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: In May

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: Please book me in Economy class.

ANSWER: I will be departing from London.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the destination of your trip?
ANSWER: The destination of my trip is Lyon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: When are you leaving?
ANSWER: I will be leaving in May.
ME:  Is the travel agent aware of the dates of your trip? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: London
TO: Lyon
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: In May

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: London
TO: Lyon
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: In May

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

ANSWER: Please book me in Economy class.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Please inform your place of departure.
ANSWER: I will be departing from London.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the destination of your trip?
ANSWER: The destination of my trip is Lyon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: When are you leaving?
ANSWER: I will be leaving in May.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of transportation do you want to use?
ANSWER: I would like to use a rented car.
ME:  Does the travel agent know how you wish to travel? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: London
TO: Lyon
BY: Rented Car
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: In May

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: Please book me in Economy class.

ANSWER: I will be departing from London.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the destination of your trip?
ANSWER: The destination of my trip is Lyon.
TRAVEL-AGENT: When are you leaving?
ANSWER: I will be leaving in May.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of transportation do you want to use?
ANSWER: I would like to use a rented car.
ME:  Do you think the travel agent knows when you want to leave? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
